name: Happy Glass
author: Poki
description: Happy Glass is a puzzle game where your mission is to cheer up a sad, empty glass by filling it with liquid! Draw lines to guide the stream of water into the glass and watch it smile as it fills up. Think outside the box to solve puzzles in unique ways and challenge yourself with different modes and levels. Can you bring joy to the glass and become the ultimate puzzle solver? How to play Happy Glass? Click and hold to draw a line. Who created Happy Glass? Happy Glass is created by Lion Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Love Balls ! How can I play Happy Glass for free? You can play Happy Glass for free on Poki. Can I play Happy Glass on mobile devices and desktop? Happy Glass can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
